message:
refactor: extract interpolateTmuxFormat helper, deduplicate format logic

Extract shared interpolateTmuxFormat() from handleTmuxListPanes and
handleTmuxDisplayMessage, fixing display-message missing pane_index,
pane_active, pane_title, pane_current_command support. Remove redundant
percentDecode fast path. Add 21 new tests for format interpolation,
percent decoding, and JSON edge cases.
